subject: Backup Charts for mariadb cluster
commit_message:
Backup Charts for mariadb cluster

Issue-ID: OOM-2088

Signed-off-by: Akansha Dua <akansha.dua@amdocs.com>
Change-Id: Ie7f25c812984abc8631a86b2385dd14a365a8ea5

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 7 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/2803/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/2803

# cat ~/override.yaml
mariadb-galera:
  backup:
    enabled: true
    cron: "*/10 * * * *"
